case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR''S OFFICE VS. ROSAMIN RUIZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-09-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY STEVEN ADELSON, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT ROSAMIN RUIZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN ADELSON. DEFENDANT ROSAMIN RUIZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE CASE HAS SETTLED AND WOULD LIKE THE CASE DISMISSED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
